---
title: 'You can''t "AI-proof your career" with a project mindset'
author: "Pavel Samsonov"
date: "2026-02-01"
date-added: "2026-03-06"
categories: [product, ux, management, ai]
status: to-read
url: "https://productpicnic.beehiiv.com/p/you-can-t-ai-proof-your-career-with-a-project-mindset"
---
